title: Mise vision worker output
description: Shared per-photo vision contract emitted by Argus (Grok) and the Qwen3-VL challenger. Vendored copy of the schema Mise owns (docs/WORKER-CONTRACT.md). Paired shadow rows must differ only by provider, so both providers serialize to exactly this shape.

basename.description: Exact file name (no directory) — Mise matches this against gallery assets.

alt_text.description: One-line alt text, or null when unavailable.

keeper_score.description: Overall keeper strength in [0,1], or null. Mise rejects out-of-range deterministically.

hero_potential.description: Hero / spread-anchor strength in [0,1], or null.
